chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2705 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 11235/18 3. For orders on M.A 11236/18 4. For hearing of main case 30.01.2019 This petition was filed on 10.09.2018. The record reflects that the petitioner and his Counsel have never taken any interest to pursue this petition even today no one is present and no intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
